doc_title: Florida Department of State 2025 Voter Eligibility Clarification Memo
label: fabricated
reason: The memo’s legal citations, event references, and procedural claims (including a “§98.0751” statute reference and specific “Reference FL DoE 2025-EC-07” issuance details) are not verifiable as authentic Florida Department of State materials
